productDisplayName: Esprit Men Avalance Black Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Avalance analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Round Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with buckle clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Black dial with embossed hour markings and numbered 12 o& rsquo clock marking in silver, minute marking in silver and chronograph mentioning days of the week and 12-24 hour time display Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and day Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters that allows you to use it when swimming, but not diving
